raw_consumer_statement:
On Sunday, XX/XX/XXXX, I took my XXXXXX/XX/XXXXXXXX to XXXX in XXXX XXXX, California for a screen repair. I was verbally told that I would receive an XXXX screen for ( I paid {$240.00} for this ), but the shop installed an XX/XX/XXXXscreen instead. After the repair, my phone began overheating and the front camera became misaligned. Because of this, I had to take my phone to XXXX the same day to have it properly repaired ( this cost {$410.00} ), resulting in me paying twice for a screen replacement. The repair shop provided poor service and caused damage to my device, so I did not feel comfortable returning to them for any further work. 

I filed a dispute with Citi Bank for the repair charge, but it was denied based on a signed receipt. Citi Bank did not appear to thoroughly review the situation. I later discovered that other customers have reported similar issues with this company in recent XXXX reviews. I sent these in as well as my repair details from XXXX to Citi Bank and was subsequently denied and informed to report my issue to the CFPB.
